offers.headline: 15% off any car rental
offers.description: Members save 15% on weekly and weekend rentals across Hertz Australia, including 4WDs for regional shifts.

offers.headline: $40 off mobile tyre fitting
offers.description: Tyres fitted at home, day or night, ideal for shift workers. Free fitting on a set of four.

offers.headline: Healthcare fleet pricing on new Nissans
offers.description: Access fleet-tier pricing on selected Nissan models for nurses and teachers via approved dealers.

offers.headline: Fleet pricing on Outback and Forester
offers.description: Subaru fleet program for oolee members. Eligible on new Outback, Forester, and XV models.

offers.headline: Save 50% on your first three boxes
offers.description: Fresh ingredients delivered weekly. Half-off the first three orders, with free shipping on order one.

offers.headline: 40% off your first EveryPlate order
offers.description: Budget-friendly meal kits delivered weekly. Members save 40% on the first box.

offers.headline: $25 off ready-made meals
offers.description: Pre-cooked, chef-made meals delivered chilled. $25 off your first order over $69.

offers.headline: $30 off high-protein meal plans
offers.description: High-protein meals built for shift workers. Members save $30 on plans of 6 meals or more.

offers.headline: Members-only price on essentials
offers.description: Save on first-aid, vitamins, and everyday pharmacy items with member pricing across the range.

offers.headline: Bonus data on prepaid plans
offers.description: Bonus data on selected prepaid plans for oolee members. Recharge online to claim.

offers.headline: $50 off the Ultrahuman Ring
offers.description: Sleep, recovery, and heart-rate tracking from a smart ring. Members get $50 off Ring Air.

offers.headline: 10% off activewear
offers.description: Australian activewear made for hard sessions. 10% off full price for oolee members.

offers.description: Award-winning mattresses with a 120-night trial. Members save $150 on queen and king sizes.

offers.headline: 25% off bedding and linen
offers.description: Premium quilt covers, sheets, and towels. 25% off full-price items for members.

offers.headline: 15% off kitchen and homewares
offers.description: Cookware, glassware, and gifts for the home. Members save 15% online and in store.

offers.headline: Member pricing on Breville appliances
offers.description: Espresso machines, blenders, and ovens at exclusive member prices via partner retailers.

offers.headline: 15% off New Balance footwear
offers.description: Comfortable trainers and lifestyle shoes. 15% off full-price styles for members.

offers.headline: 25% off suits and formalwear
offers.description: Australian menswear for special occasions. Members save 25% on suits, shirts, and ties.

offers.description: Genuine Australian sheepskin boots and slippers. 15% off online for oolee members.

offers.headline: $20 off any Oodie
offers.description: The original oversized hooded blanket. Members get $20 off any single Oodie purchase.

offers.headline: 20% off Antler luggage
offers.description: Lightweight, durable suitcases for work and travel. 20% off the full range online.

offers.description: Massages, facials, and packages at endota spa. Members save 15% on bookings nationwide.

offers.headline: First month half-price

offers.headline: $100 off curated holiday packages
